zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Degorie Robert Thorne於大約1402年出生在英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利時，他的父親Sir John Roger Thorne28歲，母親Millicent May28歲。他於大約1421年與Cecilia Young在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1435年享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Thorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

variants.name: Thorn
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thurn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Katharina, Milbert.

German: topographic name for someone who lived near a watchtower, or a metonymic occupational name for someone responsible for manning one, from Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the many places called with this word in the Rhineland, Bavaria, Austria, and Bohemia.
English (Warwickshire): variant of   Thorne  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Degorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deslauriers
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Aime, Alcide, Aurore, Cecile, Edouard, Emile, Florent, Gilles, Jacques, Jean Claude.

French: topographic name for someone living among laurels, from the plural of laurier ‘laurel’ (from Old French lorier), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name for someone from Les Lauriers, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Delaurier , Delorey , Deloria , and Delorie .

History: In North America, this surname was in most if not all cases originally a secondary surname or dit (‘also called’) name, borne by several 17th and 18th-century French Canadians, including Noël Legault dit Deslauriers (see Legault ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Degorie Robert Thorne was born about 1402, in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Roger Thorne, was 28 and his mother, Millicent May, was 28. He married Cecilia Young about 1421, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1435, at the age of 34.

Il a épousé Cecilia Young environ 1421, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1435, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ko.Thorne, Ottery Saint Mary, East Devon di: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Degorie Robert Thorne(이)가 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Roger Thorne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Millicent May(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1421년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Cecilia Young(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1435년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Thorne, Ottery Saint Mary, East Devon di: сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Degorie Robert Thorne родился около 1402 г. в местности сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Roger Thorne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent May, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Young около 1421 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1435 г. в возрасте 34 лет.
